Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14823 0 0}What brings you to the nurse's office? Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now, what do we have here? You seem rather tired. Is it a wound? A virus? A curse? Or maybe love?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}This is the perfect opportunity to test my new concoction... Eeeheeheeheehee![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}It has bitter mugwort, poison carrot, henbane, jujube, rabbit's foot, etcetera, etcetera...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}Even Hakusan's finest alchemist would be astonished by these ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}I shall improve your condition right here and now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The medicine Mr. Edogawa gave[n]me smells incredibly bizarre...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Should I drink it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I downed the strange medicine, but[n]nothing seems to have changed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}Whether or not it works is inconsequential... You survived![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}You've already emptied your cup, but... cheers to your bravery![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14815 0 0}Hm, if you'll excuse me, Saturn is calling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14820 0 0}...What do you mean you won't drink it!? Coward! Even Algernon drank it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}That normally quiet mouse went out of here positively squeaking with energy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14822 0 0}Oh, Algernon is my familiar— Er, I mean, my pet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it's best not to take too much medication when possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}You should head home and get some rest. Off you go now.[n]{f 1 1}
